message:
feat(algorithms): preserve RuntimePolicy in utility transforms

Use with_runtime_policy() to preserve the complete RuntimePolicy in:
- random_spanning_tree
- transitive_closure / transitive_reduction
- condensation
- graph_union / graph_intersection / graph_compose
- graph_difference / graph_symmetric_difference
- spanner
- make_max_clique_graph / make_clique_bipartite
- union_all / intersection_all

Closes franken_networkx-crxw.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
